title: SpaceX enters the Nasdaq-100 and Rocket Lab acquires Iridium in a major space sector advance
summary: Elon Musk's space company joins the benchmark index while Rocket Lab buys Iridium Communications for $8 billion, attracting investor attention.

title: Analysts warn about 'chipflation' and memory shortage due to the rise of artificial intelligence
summary: Morgan Stanley warns about rising chip costs due to AI investments, while SK Hynix's CEO predicts the worst memory shortage starting in 2027.

title: Fed President Kevin Warsh warns Wall Street and prepares to testify before Congress
summary: Warsh's appearance before Congress and U.S. CPI data will shape the weekly market agenda.

title: China tightens regulations on bond ratings and halts helium exports
summary: The measures include a review of corporate ratings and suspension of helium shipments, aggravating tensions in the semiconductor supply chain.

title: Debate on AI's impact on market efficiency and failure of rebranding efforts
summary: Analysts discuss whether artificial intelligence improves stock market efficiency, while companies rebranding as AI fail to sustain their stock gains.

title: Global stock markets: Saudi Arabia up, Russia steady, and Korea at historic lows

summary: Beijing lashes out at Japanese foreign minister for his comments, while the Philippines together with the US and Australia reject unilateral actions.

summary: Educational and health authorities recall the worst food poisoning outbreak in Japan, which occurred in 1996.

summary: The grand champion Onosato loses to sekiwake Yoshinofuji and then to a lesser rival, while other contenders pile up wins.

title: World Cup: France, Spain, Argentina and England to contest semi-finals

summary: Professional league games were played, the college team defeated Korea by knockout, and the 32 teams for the city tournament were decided.

summary: The Japanese golfer won the tournament held in Hokkaido, adding her second professional victory.

title: Horse racing results: Ask Nice Show wins the Tanabata Sho and Satono Revel is third in the July Cup

title: Difficulties in the fast food sector: store closures and franchise bankruptcy
